title: Abbott India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Abbott India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!
